explanation_zh: hyperglycemia (fasting)——高血糖：血糖异常升高。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The presence of glucose in the urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「糖尿：尿中出现葡萄糖。」
explanation_en: glycosuria — The presence of glucose in the urine.
explanation_zh: glycosuria——糖尿：尿中出现葡萄糖。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Excessive thirst."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「多饮：异常口渴、饮水过多。」
explanation_en: polydipsia — Excessive thirst.
explanation_zh: polydipsia——多饮：异常口渴、饮水过多。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Production of abnormally large amounts of urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「多尿：尿量异常增多。」
explanation_en: polyuria — Production of abnormally large amounts of urine.
explanation_zh: polyuria——多尿：尿量异常增多。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An abnormal enlargement of the thyroid gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺肿：甲状腺的异常增大。」
explanation_en: goiter — An abnormal enlargement of the thyroid gland.
explanation_zh: goiter——甲状腺肿：甲状腺的异常增大。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Enlargement of the thyroid gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺肿大：甲状腺的增大。」
explanation_en: thyromegaly — Enlargement of the thyroid gland.
explanation_zh: thyromegaly——甲状腺肿大：甲状腺的增大。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical removal of the thyroid gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺切除术：手术切除甲状腺。」
explanation_en: thyroidectomy — Surgical removal of the thyroid gland.
explanation_zh: thyroidectomy——甲状腺切除术：手术切除甲状腺。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A hormone that prepares the body for 'fight or flight'."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾上腺素：使机体准备「战或逃」反应的激素。」
explanation_en: adrenaline — A hormone that prepares the body for 'fight or flight'.
explanation_zh: adrenaline——肾上腺素：使机体准备「战或逃」反应的激素。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical removal of an adrenal gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾上腺切除术：手术切除肾上腺。」
explanation_en: adrenalectomy — Surgical removal of an adrenal gland.
explanation_zh: adrenalectomy——肾上腺切除术：手术切除肾上腺。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Disease or enlargement of glands, especially lymph nodes."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「腺病：腺体（尤其淋巴结）的疾病或肿大。」
explanation_en: adenopathy — Disease or enlargement of glands, especially lymph nodes.
explanation_zh: adenopathy——腺病：腺体（尤其淋巴结）的疾病或肿大。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Excessive secretion of a substance such as a hormone."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「分泌过多：某物质（如激素）的过度分泌。」
explanation_en: hypersecretion — Excessive secretion of a substance such as a hormone.
explanation_zh: hypersecretion——分泌过多：某物质（如激素）的过度分泌。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Deficient secretion of a substance such as a hormone."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「分泌不足：某物质（如激素）的分泌减少。」
explanation_en: hyposecretion — Deficient secretion of a substance such as a hormone.
explanation_zh: hyposecretion——分泌不足：某物质（如激素）的分泌减少。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Enlargement of the hands, feet, and face from excess growth hormone."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肢端肥大症：生长激素过多使手、足和面部增大。」
explanation_en: acromegaly — Enlargement of the hands, feet, and face from excess growth hormone.
explanation_zh: acromegaly——肢端肥大症：生长激素过多使手、足和面部增大。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A disorder caused by prolonged exposure to high cortisol."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「库欣综合征：长期高皮质醇暴露所致的疾病。」
explanation_en: Cushing's syndrome — A disorder caused by prolonged exposure to high cortisol.
explanation_zh: Cushing's syndrome——库欣综合征：长期高皮质醇暴露所致的疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A disorder in which the adrenal glands produce too little hormone."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「艾迪生病：肾上腺激素生成过少的疾病。」
explanation_en: Addison's disease — A disorder in which the adrenal glands produce too little hormone.
explanation_zh: Addison's disease——艾迪生病：肾上腺激素生成过少的疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Reduced hormone production by the pituitary gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「垂体功能减退：垂体激素生成减少。」
explanation_en: hypopituitarism — Reduced hormone production by the pituitary gland.
explanation_zh: hypopituitarism——垂体功能减退：垂体激素生成减少。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "All the chemical processes that maintain life in the body."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「代谢：维持机体生命的全部化学过程。」
explanation_en: metabolism — All the chemical processes that maintain life in the body.
explanation_zh: metabolism——代谢：维持机体生命的全部化学过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A mineral in body fluids that carries an electric charge."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「电解质：体液中带电荷的矿物质。」
explanation_en: electrolyte — A mineral in body fluids that carries an electric charge.
explanation_zh: electrolyte——电解质：体液中带电荷的矿物质。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally high level of potassium in the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「高钾血症：血钾水平异常升高。」
explanation_en: hyperkalemia — Abnormally high level of potassium in the blood.
explanation_zh: hyperkalemia——高钾血症：血钾水平异常升高。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally low level of potassium in the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「低钾血症：血钾水平异常偏低。」
explanation_en: hypokalemia — Abnormally low level of potassium in the blood.
explanation_zh: hypokalemia——低钾血症：血钾水平异常偏低。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Abnormally high level of calcium in the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「高钙血症：血钙水平异常升高。」
explanation_en: hypercalcemia — Abnormally high level of calcium in the blood.
explanation_zh: hypercalcemia——高钙血症：血钙水平异常升高。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Having a normally functioning thyroid gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺功能正常：甲状腺功能处于正常状态。」
explanation_en: euthyroid — Having a normally functioning thyroid gland.
explanation_zh: euthyroid——甲状腺功能正常：甲状腺功能处于正常状态。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A dangerous buildup of acids when the body breaks down fat for fuel."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「酮症酸中毒：机体分解脂肪供能时酸性物质危险性积聚。」
explanation_en: ketoacidosis — A dangerous buildup of acids when the body breaks down fat for fuel.
explanation_zh: ketoacidosis——酮症酸中毒：机体分解脂肪供能时酸性物质危险性积聚。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A pancreatic hormone that raises blood glucose."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胰高血糖素：升高血糖的胰腺激素。」
explanation_en: glucagon — A pancreatic hormone that raises blood glucose.
explanation_zh: glucagon——胰高血糖素：升高血糖的胰腺激素。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Reduced response of cells to insulin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胰岛素抵抗：细胞对胰岛素的反应减弱。」
explanation_en: insulin resistance — Reduced response of cells to insulin.
explanation_zh: insulin resistance——胰岛素抵抗：细胞对胰岛素的反应减弱。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The 'master gland' that controls other endocrine glands."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「垂体：调控其他内分泌腺的「主腺」。」
explanation_en: pituitary — The 'master gland' that controls other endocrine glands.
explanation_zh: pituitary——垂体：调控其他内分泌腺的「主腺」。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A brain region linking the nervous and endocrine systems."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「下丘脑：连接神经系统与内分泌系统的脑区。」
explanation_en: hypothalamus — A brain region linking the nervous and endocrine systems.
explanation_zh: hypothalamus——下丘脑：连接神经系统与内分泌系统的脑区。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Relating to an overactive thyroid gland."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲状腺功能亢进的：与甲状腺功能过度活跃相关。」
explanation_en: hyperthyroid (state) — Relating to an overactive thyroid gland.
explanation_zh: hyperthyroid (state)——甲状腺功能亢进的：与甲状腺功能过度活跃相关。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The microscopic filtering unit of the kidney."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾单位：肾脏的微观过滤单元。」
explanation_en: nephron — The microscopic filtering unit of the kidney.
explanation_zh: nephron——肾单位：肾脏的微观过滤单元。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The presence of stones in the kidney."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾结石症：肾脏内存在结石。」
explanation_en: nephrolithiasis — The presence of stones in the kidney.
explanation_zh: nephrolithiasis——肾结石症：肾脏内存在结石。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Infection and inflammation of the kidney, often from a UTI."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾盂肾炎：肾脏的感染和炎症，常源于尿路感染。」
explanation_en: pyelonephritis — Infection and inflammation of the kidney, often from a UTI.
explanation_zh: pyelonephritis——肾盂肾炎：肾脏的感染和炎症，常源于尿路感染。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The presence of pus (white blood cells) in the urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脓尿：尿中出现脓液（白细胞）。」
explanation_en: pyuria — The presence of pus (white blood cells) in the urine.
explanation_zh: pyuria——脓尿：尿中出现脓液（白细胞）。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Painful or difficult urination."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「排尿困难/尿痛：排尿疼痛或困难。」
explanation_en: dysuria — Painful or difficult urination.
explanation_zh: dysuria——排尿困难/尿痛：排尿疼痛或困难。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Production of an abnormally small amount of urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「少尿：尿量异常减少。」
explanation_en: oliguria — Production of an abnormally small amount of urine.
explanation_zh: oliguria——少尿：尿量异常减少。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Failure of the kidneys to produce urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「无尿：肾脏不能产生尿液。」
explanation_en: anuria — Failure of the kidneys to produce urine.
explanation_zh: anuria——无尿：肾脏不能产生尿液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The need to wake and urinate during the night."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「夜尿症：夜间需醒来排尿。」
explanation_en: nocturia — The need to wake and urinate during the night.
explanation_zh: nocturia——夜尿症：夜间需醒来排尿。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Visual examination of the bladder using a scope."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「膀胱镜检查：用内镜观察膀胱。」
explanation_en: cystoscopy (diagnostic) — Visual examination of the bladder using a scope.
explanation_zh: cystoscopy (diagnostic)——膀胱镜检查：用内镜观察膀胱。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Surgical removal of all or part of the bladder."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「膀胱切除术：手术切除全部或部分膀胱。」
explanation_en: cystectomy — Surgical removal of all or part of the bladder.
explanation_zh: cystectomy——膀胱切除术：手术切除全部或部分膀胱。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of a ureter."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「输尿管炎：输尿管的炎症。」
explanation_en: ureteritis — Inflammation of a ureter.
explanation_zh: ureteritis——输尿管炎：输尿管的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inflammation of the urethra."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「尿道炎：尿道的炎症。」
explanation_en: urethritis — Inflammation of the urethra.
explanation_zh: urethritis——尿道炎：尿道的炎症。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A kidney disorder causing heavy protein loss in urine and swelling."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾病综合征：以尿中大量蛋白丢失和水肿为特征的肾病。」
explanation_en: nephrotic syndrome — A kidney disorder causing heavy protein loss in urine and swelling.
explanation_zh: nephrotic syndrome——肾病综合征：以尿中大量蛋白丢失和水肿为特征的肾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Loss of the kidneys' ability to filter waste from the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾衰竭：肾脏过滤血液废物能力的丧失。」
explanation_en: renal failure — Loss of the kidneys' ability to filter waste from the blood.
explanation_zh: renal failure——肾衰竭：肾脏过滤血液废物能力的丧失。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Filtering the blood with a machine when the kidneys fail."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血液透析：肾衰竭时用机器过滤血液。」
explanation_en: hemodialysis — Filtering the blood with a machine when the kidneys fail.
explanation_zh: hemodialysis——血液透析：肾衰竭时用机器过滤血液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Inability to control urination."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「尿失禁：不能控制排尿。」
explanation_en: incontinence — Inability to control urination.
explanation_zh: incontinence——尿失禁：不能控制排尿。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The branch of medicine dealing with the urinary tract."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「泌尿外科学：处理泌尿系统的医学分支。」
explanation_en: urology — The branch of medicine dealing with the urinary tract.
explanation_zh: urology——泌尿外科学：处理泌尿系统的医学分支。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The formation of stones anywhere in the urinary tract."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「尿石症：泌尿系统任何部位结石的形成。」
explanation_en: urolithiasis (recurrent) — The formation of stones anywhere in the urinary tract.
explanation_zh: urolithiasis (recurrent)——尿石症：泌尿系统任何部位结石的形成。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Any disease of the kidneys."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾病：肾脏的任何疾病。」
explanation_en: nephropathy — Any disease of the kidneys.
explanation_zh: nephropathy——肾病：肾脏的任何疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A surgical opening into the kidney to drain urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾造瘘术：在肾脏造口以引流尿液。」
explanation_en: nephrostomy — A surgical opening into the kidney to drain urine.
explanation_zh: nephrostomy——肾造瘘术：在肾脏造口以引流尿液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Breaking up stones using shock waves."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「碎石术：用冲击波击碎结石。」
explanation_en: lithotripsy — Breaking up stones using shock waves.
explanation_zh: lithotripsy——碎石术：用冲击波击碎结石。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The presence of blood in the urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「血尿：尿中出现血液。」
explanation_en: hematuria (gross) — The presence of blood in the urine.
explanation_zh: hematuria (gross)——血尿：尿中出现血液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A tuft of capillaries in the nephron where blood is filtered."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾小球：肾单位中过滤血液的毛细血管丛。」
explanation_en: glomerulus — A tuft of capillaries in the nephron where blood is filtered.
explanation_zh: glomerulus——肾小球：肾单位中过滤血液的毛细血管丛。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Relating to the kidneys."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肾的：与肾脏相关的。」
explanation_en: renal — Relating to the kidneys.
explanation_zh: renal——肾的：与肾脏相关的。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The act of urinating."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「排尿：排出尿液的动作。」
explanation_en: micturition — The act of urinating.
explanation_zh: micturition——排尿：排出尿液的动作。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A bulging of the bladder into the vaginal wall."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「膀胱膨出：膀胱向阴道壁膨出。」
explanation_en: cystocele — A bulging of the bladder into the vaginal wall.
explanation_zh: cystocele——膀胱膨出：膀胱向阴道壁膨出。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A toxic buildup of waste in the blood from kidney failure."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「尿毒症：肾衰竭使废物在血中蓄积的中毒状态。」
explanation_en: uremia (chronic) — A toxic buildup of waste in the blood from kidney failure.
explanation_zh: uremia (chronic)——尿毒症：肾衰竭使废物在血中蓄积的中毒状态。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An inherited disease in which cysts fill the kidneys."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「多囊肾：囊肿充满肾脏的遗传性疾病。」
explanation_en: polycystic kidney — An inherited disease in which cysts fill the kidneys.
explanation_zh: polycystic kidney——多囊肾：囊肿充满肾脏的遗传性疾病。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A drug that increases the production of urine."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「利尿剂：增加尿液生成的药物。」
explanation_en: diuretic — A drug that increases the production of urine.
explanation_zh: diuretic——利尿剂：增加尿液生成的药物。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A tube inserted to drain urine from the bladder."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「导尿管：插入以从膀胱引流尿液的管子。」
explanation_en: urinary catheter — A tube inserted to drain urine from the bladder.
explanation_zh: urinary catheter——导尿管：插入以从膀胱引流尿液的管子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A painful, pus-filled infection of a hair follicle; a boil."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「疖：毛囊的疼痛性化脓感染；俗称疖子。」
explanation_en: furuncle — A painful, pus-filled infection of a hair follicle; a boil.
explanation_zh: furuncle——疖：毛囊的疼痛性化脓感染；俗称疖子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A fungal infection of the skin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「皮肤真菌病：皮肤的真菌感染。」
explanation_en: dermatomycosis — A fungal infection of the skin.
explanation_zh: dermatomycosis——皮肤真菌病：皮肤的真菌感染。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A thickened, horny growth of the skin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「角化病：皮肤增厚的角质性赘生。」
explanation_en: keratosis — A thickened, horny growth of the skin.
explanation_zh: keratosis——角化病：皮肤增厚的角质性赘生。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A skin cell that produces the pigment melanin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「黑素细胞：产生黑色素的皮肤细胞。」
explanation_en: melanocyte — A skin cell that produces the pigment melanin.
explanation_zh: melanocyte——黑素细胞：产生黑色素的皮肤细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A fungal infection of the nails."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「甲真菌病：指（趾）甲的真菌感染。」
explanation_en: onychomycosis — A fungal infection of the nails.

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The basic structural and functional unit of all living organisms."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞：一切生物体最基本的结构与功能单位。」
explanation_en: cell — The basic structural and functional unit of all living organisms.
explanation_zh: cell——细胞：一切生物体最基本的结构与功能单位。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The branch of biology that studies the structure and function of cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞学：研究细胞结构与功能的生物学分支。」
explanation_en: cytology — The branch of biology that studies the structure and function of cells.
explanation_zh: cytology——细胞学：研究细胞结构与功能的生物学分支。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A specialized structure within a cell that performs a specific function."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞器：细胞内执行特定功能的专门结构。」
explanation_en: organelle — A specialized structure within a cell that performs a specific function.
explanation_zh: organelle——细胞器：细胞内执行特定功能的专门结构。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The membrane-bound organelle that contains the cell's genetic material."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞核：含有细胞遗传物质的有膜细胞器。」
explanation_en: nucleus — The membrane-bound organelle that contains the cell's genetic material.
explanation_zh: nucleus——细胞核：含有细胞遗传物质的有膜细胞器。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A dense region within the nucleus where ribosomes are assembled."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「核仁：核内合成核糖体的致密区域。」
explanation_en: nucleolus — A dense region within the nucleus where ribosomes are assembled.
explanation_zh: nucleolus——核仁：核内合成核糖体的致密区域。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The gel-like substance enclosed by the cell membrane, excluding the nucleus."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞质：细胞膜内除细胞核以外的凝胶状物质。」
explanation_en: cytoplasm — The gel-like substance enclosed by the cell membrane, excluding the nucleus.
explanation_zh: cytoplasm——细胞质：细胞膜内除细胞核以外的凝胶状物质。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The fluid portion of the cytoplasm in which organelles are suspended."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胞质溶胶：细胞质中悬浮各种细胞器的液体部分。」
explanation_en: cytosol — The fluid portion of the cytoplasm in which organelles are suspended.
explanation_zh: cytosol——胞质溶胶：细胞质中悬浮各种细胞器的液体部分。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The thin barrier that surrounds the cell and controls what enters and leaves."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「质膜（细胞膜）：包绕细胞、控制物质进出的薄屏障。」
explanation_en: plasma membrane — The thin barrier that surrounds the cell and controls what enters and leaves.
explanation_zh: plasma membrane——质膜（细胞膜）：包绕细胞、控制物质进出的薄屏障。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A lipid molecule that forms the double layer of cell membranes."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「磷脂：构成细胞膜双分子层的脂质分子。」
explanation_en: phospholipid — A lipid molecule that forms the double layer of cell membranes.
explanation_zh: phospholipid——磷脂：构成细胞膜双分子层的脂质分子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The sugar-rich coating on the outer surface of the cell membrane."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「糖萼：细胞膜外表面富含糖类的包被。」
explanation_en: glycocalyx — The sugar-rich coating on the outer surface of the cell membrane.
explanation_zh: glycocalyx——糖萼：细胞膜外表面富含糖类的包被。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The organelle that generates most of the cell's ATP through respiration."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「线粒体：通过呼吸作用产生细胞大部分 ATP 的细胞器。」
explanation_en: mitochondrion — The organelle that generates most of the cell's ATP through respiration.
explanation_zh: mitochondrion——线粒体：通过呼吸作用产生细胞大部分 ATP 的细胞器。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The inner folds of the mitochondrial membrane where ATP is made."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「嵴：线粒体内膜的褶皱，是生成 ATP 的部位。」
explanation_en: cristae — The inner folds of the mitochondrial membrane where ATP is made.
explanation_zh: cristae——嵴：线粒体内膜的褶皱，是生成 ATP 的部位。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The cellular structure that builds proteins by linking amino acids."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「核糖体：通过连接氨基酸合成蛋白质的细胞结构。」
explanation_en: ribosome — The cellular structure that builds proteins by linking amino acids.
explanation_zh: ribosome——核糖体：通过连接氨基酸合成蛋白质的细胞结构。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A network of membranes that makes proteins and lipids."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「内质网：合成蛋白质和脂质的膜网状系统。」
explanation_en: endoplasmic reticulum — A network of membranes that makes proteins and lipids.
explanation_zh: endoplasmic reticulum——内质网：合成蛋白质和脂质的膜网状系统。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The organelle that modifies, sorts, and packages proteins for export."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「高尔基体：对蛋白质进行修饰、分选和包装以供输出的细胞器。」
explanation_en: Golgi apparatus — The organelle that modifies, sorts, and packages proteins for export.
explanation_zh: Golgi apparatus——高尔基体：对蛋白质进行修饰、分选和包装以供输出的细胞器。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An organelle filled with enzymes that digest waste and worn-out parts."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「溶酶体：含有消化废物和老化结构的酶的细胞器。」
explanation_en: lysosome — An organelle filled with enzymes that digest waste and worn-out parts.
explanation_zh: lysosome——溶酶体：含有消化废物和老化结构的酶的细胞器。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An organelle that breaks down fatty acids and detoxifies harmful substances."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「过氧化物酶体：分解脂肪酸并对有害物质解毒的细胞器。」
explanation_en: peroxisome — An organelle that breaks down fatty acids and detoxifies harmful substances.
explanation_zh: peroxisome——过氧化物酶体：分解脂肪酸并对有害物质解毒的细胞器。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A membrane-bound sac used for storage of water, nutrients, or waste."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「液泡：用于储存水分、养分或废物的有膜囊。」
explanation_en: vacuole — A membrane-bound sac used for storage of water, nutrients, or waste.
explanation_zh: vacuole——液泡：用于储存水分、养分或废物的有膜囊。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A small membrane sac that transports materials within or out of the cell."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「囊泡：在细胞内或向细胞外运输物质的小膜囊。」
explanation_en: vesicle — A small membrane sac that transports materials within or out of the cell.
explanation_zh: vesicle——囊泡：在细胞内或向细胞外运输物质的小膜囊。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A cylindrical structure that helps organize the spindle during cell division."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「中心粒：在细胞分裂时帮助组织纺锤体的圆柱状结构。」
explanation_en: centriole — A cylindrical structure that helps organize the spindle during cell division.
explanation_zh: centriole——中心粒：在细胞分裂时帮助组织纺锤体的圆柱状结构。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The region near the nucleus that organizes microtubules."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「中心体：核附近组织微管的区域。」
explanation_en: centrosome — The region near the nucleus that organizes microtubules.
explanation_zh: centrosome——中心体：核附近组织微管的区域。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The network of protein fibers that gives a cell its shape and support."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞骨架：赋予细胞形状和支撑的蛋白纤维网络。」
explanation_en: cytoskeleton — The network of protein fibers that gives a cell its shape and support.
explanation_zh: cytoskeleton——细胞骨架：赋予细胞形状和支撑的蛋白纤维网络。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A hollow protein tube that supports the cell and guides transport."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「微管：支撑细胞并引导物质运输的中空蛋白管。」
explanation_en: microtubule — A hollow protein tube that supports the cell and guides transport.
explanation_zh: microtubule——微管：支撑细胞并引导物质运输的中空蛋白管。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A thin actin fiber involved in cell shape and movement."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「微丝：参与细胞形态和运动的细肌动蛋白纤维。」
explanation_en: microfilament — A thin actin fiber involved in cell shape and movement.
explanation_zh: microfilament——微丝：参与细胞形态和运动的细肌动蛋白纤维。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A rope-like fiber that provides mechanical strength to cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「中间丝：为细胞提供机械强度的绳索状纤维。」
explanation_en: intermediate filament — A rope-like fiber that provides mechanical strength to cells.
explanation_zh: intermediate filament——中间丝：为细胞提供机械强度的绳索状纤维。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The loosely packed combination of DNA and proteins inside the nucleus."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「染色质：细胞核内 DNA 与蛋白质疏松结合的形式。」
explanation_en: chromatin — The loosely packed combination of DNA and proteins inside the nucleus.
explanation_zh: chromatin——染色质：细胞核内 DNA 与蛋白质疏松结合的形式。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A condensed structure of DNA that carries genetic information."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「染色体：携带遗传信息的 DNA 凝缩结构。」
explanation_en: chromosome — A condensed structure of DNA that carries genetic information.
explanation_zh: chromosome——染色体：携带遗传信息的 DNA 凝缩结构。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The double membrane that surrounds and protects the nucleus."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「核膜：包绕并保护细胞核的双层膜。」
explanation_en: nuclear envelope — The double membrane that surrounds and protects the nucleus.
explanation_zh: nuclear envelope——核膜：包绕并保护细胞核的双层膜。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A channel in the nuclear envelope that lets molecules pass in and out."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「核孔：核膜上允许分子进出的通道。」
explanation_en: nuclear pore — A channel in the nuclear envelope that lets molecules pass in and out.
explanation_zh: nuclear pore——核孔：核膜上允许分子进出的通道。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A short hair-like projection that moves fluid or particles across a cell surface."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「纤毛：细胞表面短小的毛状突起，可推动液体或颗粒。」
explanation_en: cilium — A short hair-like projection that moves fluid or particles across a cell surface.
explanation_zh: cilium——纤毛：细胞表面短小的毛状突起，可推动液体或颗粒。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A long whip-like structure that propels a cell."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「鞭毛：推动细胞运动的细长鞭状结构。」
explanation_en: flagellum — A long whip-like structure that propels a cell.
explanation_zh: flagellum——鞭毛：推动细胞运动的细长鞭状结构。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A tiny finger-like projection that increases a cell's surface area."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「微绒毛：增大细胞表面积的微小指状突起。」
explanation_en: microvillus — A tiny finger-like projection that increases a cell's surface area.
explanation_zh: microvillus——微绒毛：增大细胞表面积的微小指状突起。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An organism whose cells contain a true membrane-bound nucleus."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「真核生物：细胞含有真正有膜细胞核的生物。」
explanation_en: eukaryote — An organism whose cells contain a true membrane-bound nucleus.
explanation_zh: eukaryote——真核生物：细胞含有真正有膜细胞核的生物。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An organism whose cells lack a membrane-bound nucleus, such as bacteria."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「原核生物：细胞缺乏有膜细胞核的生物，如细菌。」
explanation_en: prokaryote — An organism whose cells lack a membrane-bound nucleus, such as bacteria.
explanation_zh: prokaryote——原核生物：细胞缺乏有膜细胞核的生物，如细菌。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Another name for the plasma membrane surrounding the cytoplasm."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胞质膜：包绕细胞质的质膜的别称。」
explanation_en: cytoplasmic membrane — Another name for the plasma membrane surrounding the cytoplasm.
explanation_zh: cytoplasmic membrane——胞质膜：包绕细胞质的质膜的别称。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A non-living particle stored in the cytoplasm, such as glycogen or fat."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「包涵物：储存于细胞质中的非生命颗粒，如糖原或脂肪。」
explanation_en: inclusion — A non-living particle stored in the cytoplasm, such as glycogen or fat.
explanation_zh: inclusion——包涵物：储存于细胞质中的非生命颗粒，如糖原或脂肪。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A point of contact that connects neighboring cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞连接：连接相邻细胞的接触点。」
explanation_en: cell junction — A point of contact that connects neighboring cells.
explanation_zh: cell junction——细胞连接：连接相邻细胞的接触点。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A cell that engulfs and digests particles or microbes."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「吞噬细胞：吞入并消化颗粒或微生物的细胞。」
explanation_en: phagocyte — A cell that engulfs and digests particles or microbes.
explanation_zh: phagocyte——吞噬细胞：吞入并消化颗粒或微生物的细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The movement of molecules from high to low concentration."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「扩散：分子从高浓度向低浓度移动的过程。」
explanation_en: diffusion — The movement of molecules from high to low concentration.
explanation_zh: diffusion——扩散：分子从高浓度向低浓度移动的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The diffusion of water across a selectively permeable membrane."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「渗透：水分子跨选择性通透膜的扩散。」
explanation_en: osmosis — The diffusion of water across a selectively permeable membrane.
explanation_zh: osmosis——渗透：水分子跨选择性通透膜的扩散。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Movement of substances across a membrane without using energy."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「被动运输：物质不消耗能量跨膜移动。」
explanation_en: passive transport — Movement of substances across a membrane without using energy.
explanation_zh: passive transport——被动运输：物质不消耗能量跨膜移动。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Movement of substances across a membrane using cellular energy."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「主动运输：物质消耗细胞能量逆向跨膜移动。」
explanation_en: active transport — Movement of substances across a membrane using cellular energy.
explanation_zh: active transport——主动运输：物质消耗细胞能量逆向跨膜移动。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Passive movement of molecules through membrane proteins."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「易化扩散：分子借助膜蛋白进行的被动移动。」
explanation_en: facilitated diffusion — Passive movement of molecules through membrane proteins.
explanation_zh: facilitated diffusion——易化扩散：分子借助膜蛋白进行的被动移动。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The process by which a cell takes in material by engulfing it."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胞吞作用：细胞通过包裹方式摄入物质的过程。」
explanation_en: endocytosis — The process by which a cell takes in material by engulfing it.
explanation_zh: endocytosis——胞吞作用：细胞通过包裹方式摄入物质的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The process by which a cell releases material in vesicles."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胞吐作用：细胞以囊泡形式向外释放物质的过程。」
explanation_en: exocytosis — The process by which a cell releases material in vesicles.
explanation_zh: exocytosis——胞吐作用：细胞以囊泡形式向外释放物质的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The engulfing of large particles or cells by a cell."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「吞噬作用：细胞吞入大颗粒或其他细胞。」
explanation_en: phagocytosis — The engulfing of large particles or cells by a cell.
explanation_zh: phagocytosis——吞噬作用：细胞吞入大颗粒或其他细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The uptake of fluid and dissolved substances by a cell."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胞饮作用：细胞摄入液体及其中溶解物质的过程。」
explanation_en: pinocytosis — The uptake of fluid and dissolved substances by a cell.
explanation_zh: pinocytosis——胞饮作用：细胞摄入液体及其中溶解物质的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A membrane protein that lets specific ions pass through."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「离子通道：允许特定离子通过的膜蛋白。」
explanation_en: ion channel — A membrane protein that lets specific ions pass through.
explanation_zh: ion channel——离子通道：允许特定离子通过的膜蛋白。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A membrane protein that binds and moves molecules across the membrane."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「载体蛋白：结合并转运分子跨膜的膜蛋白。」
explanation_en: carrier protein — A membrane protein that binds and moves molecules across the membrane.
explanation_zh: carrier protein——载体蛋白：结合并转运分子跨膜的膜蛋白。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A difference in the amount of a substance between two regions."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「浓度梯度：某物质在两个区域之间的含量差异。」
explanation_en: concentration gradient — A difference in the amount of a substance between two regions.
explanation_zh: concentration gradient——浓度梯度：某物质在两个区域之间的含量差异。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Having the same solute concentration as another solution."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「等渗的：与另一溶液溶质浓度相同。」
explanation_en: isotonic — Having the same solute concentration as another solution.
explanation_zh: isotonic——等渗的：与另一溶液溶质浓度相同。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Having a lower solute concentration than another solution."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「低渗的：溶质浓度低于另一溶液。」
explanation_en: hypotonic — Having a lower solute concentration than another solution.
explanation_zh: hypotonic——低渗的：溶质浓度低于另一溶液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Having a higher solute concentration than another solution."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「高渗的：溶质浓度高于另一溶液。」
explanation_en: hypertonic — Having a higher solute concentration than another solution.
explanation_zh: hypertonic——高渗的：溶质浓度高于另一溶液。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The voltage difference across a cell's membrane."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「膜电位：细胞膜两侧的电压差。」
explanation_en: membrane potential — The voltage difference across a cell's membrane.
explanation_zh: membrane potential——膜电位：细胞膜两侧的电压差。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Adenosine triphosphate, the main energy-carrying molecule of cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「ATP（三磷酸腺苷）：细胞主要的能量载体分子。」
explanation_en: ATP — Adenosine triphosphate, the main energy-carrying molecule of cells.
explanation_zh: ATP——ATP（三磷酸腺苷）：细胞主要的能量载体分子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "All the chemical reactions that occur within a cell or organism."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「代谢：细胞或机体内发生的全部化学反应。」
explanation_en: metabolism — All the chemical reactions that occur within a cell or organism.
explanation_zh: metabolism——代谢：细胞或机体内发生的全部化学反应。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The metabolic building of complex molecules from simpler ones."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「合成代谢：由简单分子构建复杂分子的代谢过程。」
explanation_en: anabolism — The metabolic building of complex molecules from simpler ones.
explanation_zh: anabolism——合成代谢：由简单分子构建复杂分子的代谢过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The metabolic breakdown of molecules to release energy."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「分解代谢：分解分子以释放能量的代谢过程。」
explanation_en: catabolism — The metabolic breakdown of molecules to release energy.
explanation_zh: catabolism——分解代谢：分解分子以释放能量的代谢过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A protein that speeds up a specific chemical reaction."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「酶：加速特定化学反应的蛋白质。」
explanation_en: enzyme — A protein that speeds up a specific chemical reaction.
explanation_zh: enzyme——酶：加速特定化学反应的蛋白质。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The molecule on which an enzyme acts."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「底物：酶所作用的分子。」
explanation_en: substrate — The molecule on which an enzyme acts.
explanation_zh: substrate——底物：酶所作用的分子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The breakdown of glucose into pyruvate, releasing some energy."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「糖酵解：将葡萄糖分解为丙酮酸并释放少量能量的过程。」
explanation_en: glycolysis — The breakdown of glucose into pyruvate, releasing some energy.
explanation_zh: glycolysis——糖酵解：将葡萄糖分解为丙酮酸并释放少量能量的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The process that converts nutrients into ATP using oxygen."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞呼吸：利用氧气将养分转化为 ATP 的过程。」
explanation_en: cellular respiration — The process that converts nutrients into ATP using oxygen.
explanation_zh: cellular respiration——细胞呼吸：利用氧气将养分转化为 ATP 的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The mitochondrial process that produces most ATP using oxygen."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「氧化磷酸化：线粒体利用氧气生成大部分 ATP 的过程。」
explanation_en: oxidative phosphorylation — The mitochondrial process that produces most ATP using oxygen.
explanation_zh: oxidative phosphorylation——氧化磷酸化：线粒体利用氧气生成大部分 ATP 的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The relay of a signal from outside the cell to a response inside."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「信号转导：将细胞外信号传递为细胞内反应的过程。」
explanation_en: signal transduction — The relay of a signal from outside the cell to a response inside.
explanation_zh: signal transduction——信号转导：将细胞外信号传递为细胞内反应的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A protein that binds a specific molecule and triggers a response."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「受体：结合特定分子并引发反应的蛋白质。」
explanation_en: receptor — A protein that binds a specific molecule and triggers a response.
explanation_zh: receptor——受体：结合特定分子并引发反应的蛋白质。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A molecule that binds to a receptor to produce an effect."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「配体：与受体结合以产生效应的分子。」
explanation_en: ligand — A molecule that binds to a receptor to produce an effect.
explanation_zh: ligand——配体：与受体结合以产生效应的分子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Programmed cell death that removes unwanted or damaged cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞凋亡：清除不需要或受损细胞的程序性细胞死亡。」
explanation_en: apoptosis — Programmed cell death that removes unwanted or damaged cells.
explanation_zh: apoptosis——细胞凋亡：清除不需要或受损细胞的程序性细胞死亡。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The process by which a cell digests its own worn-out components."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「自噬：细胞消化自身老化组分的过程。」
explanation_en: autophagy — The process by which a cell digests its own worn-out components.
explanation_zh: autophagy——自噬：细胞消化自身老化组分的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The ordered series of stages a cell passes through to divide."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞周期：细胞为分裂而经历的有序阶段序列。」
explanation_en: cell cycle — The ordered series of stages a cell passes through to divide.
explanation_zh: cell cycle——细胞周期：细胞为分裂而经历的有序阶段序列。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The phase of the cell cycle when a cell grows and copies its DNA."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「间期：细胞生长并复制 DNA 的细胞周期阶段。」
explanation_en: interphase — The phase of the cell cycle when a cell grows and copies its DNA.
explanation_zh: interphase——间期：细胞生长并复制 DNA 的细胞周期阶段。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The division of the nucleus that produces two identical cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「有丝分裂：产生两个完全相同细胞的核分裂过程。」
explanation_en: mitosis — The division of the nucleus that produces two identical cells.
explanation_zh: mitosis——有丝分裂：产生两个完全相同细胞的核分裂过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The division of the cytoplasm that completes cell division."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胞质分裂：完成细胞分裂的细胞质分裂过程。」
explanation_en: cytokinesis — The division of the cytoplasm that completes cell division.
explanation_zh: cytokinesis——胞质分裂：完成细胞分裂的细胞质分裂过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The first stage of mitosis, when chromosomes condense."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「前期：有丝分裂的第一阶段，染色体凝缩。」
explanation_en: prophase — The first stage of mitosis, when chromosomes condense.
explanation_zh: prophase——前期：有丝分裂的第一阶段，染色体凝缩。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The stage of mitosis when chromosomes line up at the cell's center."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「中期：染色体排列在细胞中央的有丝分裂阶段。」
explanation_en: metaphase — The stage of mitosis when chromosomes line up at the cell's center.
explanation_zh: metaphase——中期：染色体排列在细胞中央的有丝分裂阶段。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The stage of mitosis when sister chromatids separate."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「后期：姐妹染色单体分离的有丝分裂阶段。」
explanation_en: anaphase — The stage of mitosis when sister chromatids separate.
explanation_zh: anaphase——后期：姐妹染色单体分离的有丝分裂阶段。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The final stage of mitosis, when two new nuclei form."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「末期：有丝分裂的最后阶段，形成两个新核。」
explanation_en: telophase — The final stage of mitosis, when two new nuclei form.
explanation_zh: telophase——末期：有丝分裂的最后阶段，形成两个新核。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Deoxyribonucleic acid, the molecule that stores genetic information."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「DNA（脱氧核糖核酸）：储存遗传信息的分子。」
explanation_en: DNA — Deoxyribonucleic acid, the molecule that stores genetic information.
explanation_zh: DNA——DNA（脱氧核糖核酸）：储存遗传信息的分子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Ribonucleic acid, a molecule that helps carry out genetic instructions."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「RNA（核糖核酸）：协助执行遗传指令的分子。」
explanation_en: RNA — Ribonucleic acid, a molecule that helps carry out genetic instructions.
explanation_zh: RNA——RNA（核糖核酸）：协助执行遗传指令的分子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The basic building block of DNA and RNA."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「核苷酸：DNA 和 RNA 的基本结构单元。」
explanation_en: nucleotide — The basic building block of DNA and RNA.
explanation_zh: nucleotide——核苷酸：DNA 和 RNA 的基本结构单元。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A large molecule, such as DNA or RNA, made of nucleotides."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「核酸：由核苷酸构成的大分子，如 DNA 或 RNA。」
explanation_en: nucleic acid — A large molecule, such as DNA or RNA, made of nucleotides.
explanation_zh: nucleic acid——核酸：由核苷酸构成的大分子，如 DNA 或 RNA。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A segment of DNA that codes for a particular protein or trait."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「基因：编码特定蛋白质或性状的 DNA 片段。」
explanation_en: gene — A segment of DNA that codes for a particular protein or trait.
explanation_zh: gene——基因：编码特定蛋白质或性状的 DNA 片段。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The complete set of genetic material in an organism."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「基因组：一个生物体全部遗传物质的总和。」
explanation_en: genome — The complete set of genetic material in an organism.
explanation_zh: genome——基因组：一个生物体全部遗传物质的总和。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "One of the alternative forms of a gene."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「等位基因：一个基因的不同形式之一。」
explanation_en: allele — One of the alternative forms of a gene.
explanation_zh: allele——等位基因：一个基因的不同形式之一。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "One of the two identical halves of a duplicated chromosome."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「染色单体：已复制染色体的两个相同部分之一。」
explanation_en: chromatid — One of the two identical halves of a duplicated chromosome.
explanation_zh: chromatid——染色单体：已复制染色体的两个相同部分之一。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The region that joins two sister chromatids together."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「着丝粒：连接两条姐妹染色单体的区域。」
explanation_en: centromere — The region that joins two sister chromatids together.
explanation_zh: centromere——着丝粒：连接两条姐妹染色单体的区域。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A protective cap at the end of a chromosome."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「端粒：染色体末端的保护性结构。」
explanation_en: telomere — A protective cap at the end of a chromosome.
explanation_zh: telomere——端粒：染色体末端的保护性结构。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A sequence of three bases that codes for one amino acid."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「密码子：编码一个氨基酸的三个碱基序列。」
explanation_en: codon — A sequence of three bases that codes for one amino acid.
explanation_zh: codon——密码子：编码一个氨基酸的三个碱基序列。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The process of copying DNA into messenger RNA."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「转录：将 DNA 拷贝为信使 RNA 的过程。」
explanation_en: transcription — The process of copying DNA into messenger RNA.
explanation_zh: transcription——转录：将 DNA 拷贝为信使 RNA 的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The process of building a protein from a messenger RNA sequence."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「翻译：依据信使 RNA 序列合成蛋白质的过程。」
explanation_en: translation — The process of building a protein from a messenger RNA sequence.
explanation_zh: translation——翻译：依据信使 RNA 序列合成蛋白质的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The copying of a DNA molecule before cell division."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「复制：细胞分裂前对 DNA 分子的拷贝。」
explanation_en: replication — The copying of a DNA molecule before cell division.
explanation_zh: replication——复制：细胞分裂前对 DNA 分子的拷贝。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A change in the DNA sequence of a gene."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「突变：基因 DNA 序列的改变。」
explanation_en: mutation — A change in the DNA sequence of a gene.
explanation_zh: mutation——突变：基因 DNA 序列的改变。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The RNA that carries genetic instructions from DNA to the ribosome."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「信使 RNA：将遗传指令从 DNA 带到核糖体的 RNA。」
explanation_en: messenger RNA — The RNA that carries genetic instructions from DNA to the ribosome.
explanation_zh: messenger RNA——信使 RNA：将遗传指令从 DNA 带到核糖体的 RNA。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The RNA that brings amino acids to the ribosome during translation."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「转运 RNA：翻译时将氨基酸带到核糖体的 RNA。」
explanation_en: transfer RNA — The RNA that brings amino acids to the ribosome during translation.
explanation_zh: transfer RNA——转运 RNA：翻译时将氨基酸带到核糖体的 RNA。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The RNA that forms part of the structure of ribosomes."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「核糖体 RNA：构成核糖体结构一部分的 RNA。」
explanation_en: ribosomal RNA — The RNA that forms part of the structure of ribosomes.
explanation_zh: ribosomal RNA——核糖体 RNA：构成核糖体结构一部分的 RNA。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An enzyme that builds nucleic acids by linking nucleotides."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「聚合酶：通过连接核苷酸合成核酸的酶。」
explanation_en: polymerase — An enzyme that builds nucleic acids by linking nucleotides.
explanation_zh: polymerase——聚合酶：通过连接核苷酸合成核酸的酶。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An enzyme that unwinds the DNA double helix."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「解旋酶：解开 DNA 双螺旋的酶。」
explanation_en: helicase — An enzyme that unwinds the DNA double helix.
explanation_zh: helicase——解旋酶：解开 DNA 双螺旋的酶。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Two complementary bases joined across the DNA strands."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「碱基对：DNA 两条链间互补配对的两个碱基。」
explanation_en: base pair — Two complementary bases joined across the DNA strands.
explanation_zh: base pair——碱基对：DNA 两条链间互补配对的两个碱基。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The twisted-ladder shape of the DNA molecule."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「双螺旋：DNA 分子的扭曲梯状结构。」
explanation_en: double helix — The twisted-ladder shape of the DNA molecule.
explanation_zh: double helix——双螺旋：DNA 分子的扭曲梯状结构。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The genetic makeup of an organism."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「基因型：生物体的遗传组成。」
explanation_en: genotype — The genetic makeup of an organism.
explanation_zh: genotype——基因型：生物体的遗传组成。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The observable characteristics of an organism."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「表型：生物体可观察到的性状特征。」
explanation_en: phenotype — The observable characteristics of an organism.
explanation_zh: phenotype——表型：生物体可观察到的性状特征。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Describing an allele that is expressed even when only one copy is present."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「显性的：只需一个拷贝即可表达的等位基因。」
explanation_en: dominant — Describing an allele that is expressed even when only one copy is present.
explanation_zh: dominant——显性的：只需一个拷贝即可表达的等位基因。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Describing an allele expressed only when two copies are present."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「隐性的：需两个拷贝才能表达的等位基因。」
explanation_en: recessive — Describing an allele expressed only when two copies are present.
explanation_zh: recessive——隐性的：需两个拷贝才能表达的等位基因。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Having two different alleles for a particular gene."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「杂合的：某基因具有两个不同等位基因。」
explanation_en: heterozygous — Having two different alleles for a particular gene.
explanation_zh: heterozygous——杂合的：某基因具有两个不同等位基因。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Having two identical alleles for a particular gene."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「纯合的：某基因具有两个相同等位基因。」
explanation_en: homozygous — Having two identical alleles for a particular gene.
explanation_zh: homozygous——纯合的：某基因具有两个相同等位基因。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Having two complete sets of chromosomes."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「二倍体：具有两套完整染色体。」
explanation_en: diploid — Having two complete sets of chromosomes.
explanation_zh: diploid——二倍体：具有两套完整染色体。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Having a single set of chromosomes, as in gametes."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「单倍体：仅有一套染色体，如配子。」
explanation_en: haploid — Having a single set of chromosomes, as in gametes.
explanation_zh: haploid——单倍体：仅有一套染色体，如配子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The process by which a gene's information is used to make a product."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「基因表达：利用基因信息生成产物的过程。」
explanation_en: gene expression — The process by which a gene's information is used to make a product.
explanation_zh: gene expression——基因表达：利用基因信息生成产物的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A chain of many amino acids linked together."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「多肽：由许多氨基酸连接而成的链。」
explanation_en: polypeptide — A chain of many amino acids linked together.
explanation_zh: polypeptide——多肽：由许多氨基酸连接而成的链。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The building block of proteins."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「氨基酸：蛋白质的结构单元。」
explanation_en: amino acid — The building block of proteins.
explanation_zh: amino acid——氨基酸：蛋白质的结构单元。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The cellular process of building proteins from amino acids."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「蛋白质合成：细胞由氨基酸构建蛋白质的过程。」
explanation_en: protein synthesis — The cellular process of building proteins from amino acids.
explanation_zh: protein synthesis——蛋白质合成：细胞由氨基酸构建蛋白质的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A small molecule that can join others to form a polymer."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「单体：能与其他分子连接形成聚合物的小分子。」
explanation_en: monomer — A small molecule that can join others to form a polymer.
explanation_zh: monomer——单体：能与其他分子连接形成聚合物的小分子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A large molecule made of many repeating subunits."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「聚合物：由许多重复亚基构成的大分子。」
explanation_en: polymer — A large molecule made of many repeating subunits.
explanation_zh: polymer——聚合物：由许多重复亚基构成的大分子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The five-carbon sugar found in DNA."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脱氧核糖：DNA 中的五碳糖。」
explanation_en: deoxyribose — The five-carbon sugar found in DNA.
explanation_zh: deoxyribose——脱氧核糖：DNA 中的五碳糖。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A group of similar cells that work together to perform a function."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「组织：一群协同执行某种功能的相似细胞。」
explanation_en: tissue — A group of similar cells that work together to perform a function.
explanation_zh: tissue——组织：一群协同执行某种功能的相似细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The microscopic study of the structure of tissues."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「组织学：在显微镜下研究组织结构的学科。」
explanation_en: histology — The microscopic study of the structure of tissues.
explanation_zh: histology——组织学：在显微镜下研究组织结构的学科。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The tissue that covers body surfaces and lines cavities."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「上皮：覆盖体表并衬于体腔内表面的组织。」
explanation_en: epithelium — The tissue that covers body surfaces and lines cavities.
explanation_zh: epithelium——上皮：覆盖体表并衬于体腔内表面的组织。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A tissue type forming protective layers and linings."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「上皮组织：形成保护性覆盖层和衬里的组织类型。」
explanation_en: epithelial tissue — A tissue type forming protective layers and linings.
explanation_zh: epithelial tissue——上皮组织：形成保护性覆盖层和衬里的组织类型。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A tissue that supports, binds, or separates other tissues."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「结缔组织：支持、连接或分隔其他组织的组织。」
explanation_en: connective tissue — A tissue that supports, binds, or separates other tissues.
explanation_zh: connective tissue——结缔组织：支持、连接或分隔其他组织的组织。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A tissue specialized to contract and produce movement."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肌组织：专门用于收缩并产生运动的组织。」
explanation_en: muscle tissue — A tissue specialized to contract and produce movement.
explanation_zh: muscle tissue——肌组织：专门用于收缩并产生运动的组织。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A tissue that transmits electrical signals through the body."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「神经组织：在体内传导电信号的组织。」
explanation_en: nervous tissue — A tissue that transmits electrical signals through the body.
explanation_zh: nervous tissue——神经组织：在体内传导电信号的组织。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Describing flat, scale-like epithelial cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「鳞状的：形容扁平、鳞片状的上皮细胞。」
explanation_en: squamous — Describing flat, scale-like epithelial cells.
explanation_zh: squamous——鳞状的：形容扁平、鳞片状的上皮细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Describing cube-shaped epithelial cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「立方的：形容立方体形状的上皮细胞。」
explanation_en: cuboidal — Describing cube-shaped epithelial cells.
explanation_zh: cuboidal——立方的：形容立方体形状的上皮细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Describing tall, column-shaped epithelial cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「柱状的：形容高柱形的上皮细胞。」
explanation_en: columnar — Describing tall, column-shaped epithelial cells.
explanation_zh: columnar——柱状的：形容高柱形的上皮细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A thin layer that anchors epithelium to underlying tissue."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「基膜：将上皮固定于下层组织的薄层。」
explanation_en: basement membrane — A thin layer that anchors epithelium to underlying tissue.
explanation_zh: basement membrane——基膜：将上皮固定于下层组织的薄层。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A structure that produces and releases a substance."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「腺体：产生并释放某种物质的结构。」
explanation_en: gland — A structure that produces and releases a substance.
explanation_zh: gland——腺体：产生并释放某种物质的结构。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A gland that releases its product through a duct."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「外分泌腺：通过导管释放分泌物的腺体。」
explanation_en: exocrine gland — A gland that releases its product through a duct.
explanation_zh: exocrine gland——外分泌腺：通过导管释放分泌物的腺体。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A gland that releases hormones directly into the blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「内分泌腺：将激素直接释放入血的腺体。」
explanation_en: endocrine gland — A gland that releases hormones directly into the blood.
explanation_zh: endocrine gland——内分泌腺：将激素直接释放入血的腺体。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A strong fibrous protein that gives connective tissue strength."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胶原蛋白：赋予结缔组织强度的强韧纤维蛋白。」
explanation_en: collagen — A strong fibrous protein that gives connective tissue strength.
explanation_zh: collagen——胶原蛋白：赋予结缔组织强度的强韧纤维蛋白。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A protein that lets tissues stretch and return to shape."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「弹性蛋白：使组织能够伸展并回弹的蛋白质。」
explanation_en: elastin — A protein that lets tissues stretch and return to shape.
explanation_zh: elastin——弹性蛋白：使组织能够伸展并回弹的蛋白质。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A connective tissue cell that produces collagen and fibers."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「成纤维细胞：产生胶原和纤维的结缔组织细胞。」
explanation_en: fibroblast — A connective tissue cell that produces collagen and fibers.
explanation_zh: fibroblast——成纤维细胞：产生胶原和纤维的结缔组织细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Connective tissue that stores energy as fat."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脂肪组织：以脂肪形式储存能量的结缔组织。」
explanation_en: adipose tissue — Connective tissue that stores energy as fat.
explanation_zh: adipose tissue——脂肪组织：以脂肪形式储存能量的结缔组织。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A loose connective tissue that holds organs in place."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「疏松结缔组织：将器官固定在适当位置的疏松组织。」
explanation_en: areolar tissue — A loose connective tissue that holds organs in place.
explanation_zh: areolar tissue——疏松结缔组织：将器官固定在适当位置的疏松组织。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The network of molecules outside cells that supports tissue."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「细胞外基质：细胞外支撑组织的分子网络。」
explanation_en: extracellular matrix — The network of molecules outside cells that supports tissue.
explanation_zh: extracellular matrix——细胞外基质：细胞外支撑组织的分子网络。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The main cell type of the epidermis, producing keratin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「角质形成细胞：表皮的主要细胞类型，产生角蛋白。」
explanation_en: keratinocyte — The main cell type of the epidermis, producing keratin.
explanation_zh: keratinocyte——角质形成细胞：表皮的主要细胞类型，产生角蛋白。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A column-shaped cell that secretes protective mucus."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「杯状细胞：分泌保护性黏液的柱状细胞。」
explanation_en: goblet cell — A column-shaped cell that secretes protective mucus.
explanation_zh: goblet cell——杯状细胞：分泌保护性黏液的柱状细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Epithelium arranged in multiple cell layers."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「复层上皮：由多层细胞排列而成的上皮。」
explanation_en: stratified epithelium — Epithelium arranged in multiple cell layers.
explanation_zh: stratified epithelium——复层上皮：由多层细胞排列而成的上皮。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Epithelium made of a single layer of cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「单层上皮：由单层细胞构成的上皮。」
explanation_en: simple epithelium — Epithelium made of a single layer of cells.
explanation_zh: simple epithelium——单层上皮：由单层细胞构成的上皮。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The thin epithelium lining blood vessels and the heart."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「内皮：衬于血管和心脏内表面的薄上皮。」
explanation_en: endothelium — The thin epithelium lining blood vessels and the heart.
explanation_zh: endothelium——内皮：衬于血管和心脏内表面的薄上皮。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The epithelium that lines body cavities such as the abdomen."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「间皮：衬于腹腔等体腔内表面的上皮。」
explanation_en: mesothelium — The epithelium that lines body cavities such as the abdomen.
explanation_zh: mesothelium——间皮：衬于腹腔等体腔内表面的上皮。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A large immune cell that engulfs pathogens and debris."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「巨噬细胞：吞噬病原体和碎屑的大型免疫细胞。」
explanation_en: macrophage — A large immune cell that engulfs pathogens and debris.
explanation_zh: macrophage——巨噬细胞：吞噬病原体和碎屑的大型免疫细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A connective tissue cell that releases histamine in allergic responses."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「肥大细胞：在过敏反应中释放组胺的结缔组织细胞。」
explanation_en: mast cell — A connective tissue cell that releases histamine in allergic responses.
explanation_zh: mast cell——肥大细胞：在过敏反应中释放组胺的结缔组织细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An immune cell that produces antibodies."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「浆细胞：产生抗体的免疫细胞。」
explanation_en: plasma cell — An immune cell that produces antibodies.
explanation_zh: plasma cell——浆细胞：产生抗体的免疫细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The gel-like material filling the space between cells and fibers."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「基质：填充于细胞与纤维间隙的凝胶状物质。」
explanation_en: ground substance — The gel-like material filling the space between cells and fibers.
explanation_zh: ground substance——基质：填充于细胞与纤维间隙的凝胶状物质。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A fine collagen fiber that forms supporting networks in organs."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「网状纤维：在器官中形成支持网络的细胶原纤维。」
explanation_en: reticular fiber — A fine collagen fiber that forms supporting networks in organs.
explanation_zh: reticular fiber——网状纤维：在器官中形成支持网络的细胶原纤维。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Epithelium that appears layered but is a single layer."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「假复层上皮：看似分层、实为单层的上皮。」
explanation_en: pseudostratified epithelium — Epithelium that appears layered but is a single layer.
explanation_zh: pseudostratified epithelium——假复层上皮：看似分层、实为单层的上皮。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A skin cell that produces the pigment melanin."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「黑素细胞：产生黑色素的皮肤细胞。」
explanation_en: melanocyte — A skin cell that produces the pigment melanin.
explanation_zh: melanocyte——黑素细胞：产生黑色素的皮肤细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The single cell formed when a sperm fertilizes an egg."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「受精卵（合子）：精子使卵子受精后形成的单个细胞。」
explanation_en: zygote — The single cell formed when a sperm fertilizes an egg.
explanation_zh: zygote——受精卵（合子）：精子使卵子受精后形成的单个细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A reproductive cell, such as a sperm or egg."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「配子：生殖细胞，如精子或卵子。」
explanation_en: gamete — A reproductive cell, such as a sperm or egg.
explanation_zh: gamete——配子：生殖细胞，如精子或卵子。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The fusion of a sperm and an egg to form a zygote."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「受精：精子与卵子融合形成受精卵。」
explanation_en: fertilization — The fusion of a sperm and an egg to form a zygote.
explanation_zh: fertilization——受精：精子与卵子融合形成受精卵。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An organism in its earliest stage of development."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胚胎：处于发育最早阶段的生物体。」
explanation_en: embryo — An organism in its earliest stage of development.
explanation_zh: embryo——胚胎：处于发育最早阶段的生物体。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An unborn offspring in the later stages of development."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胎儿：发育后期尚未出生的后代。」
explanation_en: fetus — An unborn offspring in the later stages of development.
explanation_zh: fetus——胎儿：发育后期尚未出生的后代。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An early embryo consisting of a hollow ball of cells."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「囊胚：由中空细胞球构成的早期胚胎。」
explanation_en: blastocyst — An early embryo consisting of a hollow ball of cells.
explanation_zh: blastocyst——囊胚：由中空细胞球构成的早期胚胎。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A solid ball of cells formed by early divisions of the zygote."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「桑椹胚：受精卵早期分裂形成的实心细胞球。」
explanation_en: morula — A solid ball of cells formed by early divisions of the zygote.
explanation_zh: morula——桑椹胚：受精卵早期分裂形成的实心细胞球。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The series of rapid cell divisions after fertilization."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「卵裂：受精后一系列快速的细胞分裂。」
explanation_en: cleavage — The series of rapid cell divisions after fertilization.
explanation_zh: cleavage——卵裂：受精后一系列快速的细胞分裂。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The attachment of the embryo to the wall of the uterus."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「着床：胚胎附着于子宫壁的过程。」
explanation_en: implantation — The attachment of the embryo to the wall of the uterus.
explanation_zh: implantation——着床：胚胎附着于子宫壁的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The process that forms the three germ layers of the embryo."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「原肠胚形成：形成胚胎三个胚层的过程。」
explanation_en: gastrulation — The process that forms the three germ layers of the embryo.
explanation_zh: gastrulation——原肠胚形成：形成胚胎三个胚层的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "One of the three primary cell layers of the early embryo."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胚层：早期胚胎三个主要细胞层之一。」
explanation_en: germ layer — One of the three primary cell layers of the early embryo.
explanation_zh: germ layer——胚层：早期胚胎三个主要细胞层之一。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The outer germ layer that forms skin and nervous tissue."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「外胚层：形成皮肤和神经组织的外层胚层。」
explanation_en: ectoderm — The outer germ layer that forms skin and nervous tissue.
explanation_zh: ectoderm——外胚层：形成皮肤和神经组织的外层胚层。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The middle germ layer that forms muscle, bone, and blood."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「中胚层：形成肌肉、骨骼和血液的中层胚层。」
explanation_en: mesoderm — The middle germ layer that forms muscle, bone, and blood.
explanation_zh: mesoderm——中胚层：形成肌肉、骨骼和血液的中层胚层。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The inner germ layer that forms the lining of internal organs."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「内胚层：形成内脏器官内衬的内层胚层。」
explanation_en: endoderm — The inner germ layer that forms the lining of internal organs.
explanation_zh: endoderm——内胚层：形成内脏器官内衬的内层胚层。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The process by which cells become specialized."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「分化：细胞变得专门化的过程。」
explanation_en: differentiation — The process by which cells become specialized.
explanation_zh: differentiation——分化：细胞变得专门化的过程。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An unspecialized cell that can develop into many cell types."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「干细胞：能发育为多种细胞类型的未分化细胞。」
explanation_en: stem cell — An unspecialized cell that can develop into many cell types.
explanation_zh: stem cell——干细胞：能发育为多种细胞类型的未分化细胞。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Able to develop into any cell type, including a whole organism."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「全能的：能发育为任何细胞类型乃至完整个体。」
explanation_en: totipotent — Able to develop into any cell type, including a whole organism.
explanation_zh: totipotent——全能的：能发育为任何细胞类型乃至完整个体。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Able to develop into nearly any cell type of the body."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「多能的：能发育为机体几乎任何细胞类型。」
explanation_en: pluripotent — Able to develop into nearly any cell type of the body.
explanation_zh: pluripotent——多能的：能发育为机体几乎任何细胞类型。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The formation of organs during embryonic development."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「器官发生：胚胎发育期间器官的形成。」
explanation_en: organogenesis — The formation of organs during embryonic development.
explanation_zh: organogenesis——器官发生：胚胎发育期间器官的形成。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A flexible rod that defines the body axis in the early embryo."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脊索：早期胚胎中确定身体轴线的柔韧索状结构。」
explanation_en: notochord — A flexible rod that defines the body axis in the early embryo.
explanation_zh: notochord——脊索：早期胚胎中确定身体轴线的柔韧索状结构。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The embryonic structure that becomes the brain and spinal cord."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「神经管：发育为脑和脊髓的胚胎结构。」
explanation_en: neural tube — The embryonic structure that becomes the brain and spinal cord.
explanation_zh: neural tube——神经管：发育为脑和脊髓的胚胎结构。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "A block of mesoderm that forms muscle and vertebrae."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「体节：形成肌肉和椎骨的中胚层块。」
explanation_en: somite — A block of mesoderm that forms muscle and vertebrae.
explanation_zh: somite——体节：形成肌肉和椎骨的中胚层块。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The organ that supplies the fetus with nutrients and oxygen."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胎盘：向胎儿供应养分和氧气的器官。」
explanation_en: placenta — The organ that supplies the fetus with nutrients and oxygen.
explanation_zh: placenta——胎盘：向胎儿供应养分和氧气的器官。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The cord that links the fetus to the placenta."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「脐带：连接胎儿与胎盘的索带。」
explanation_en: umbilical cord — The cord that links the fetus to the placenta.
explanation_zh: umbilical cord——脐带：连接胎儿与胎盘的索带。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The fluid-filled membrane that surrounds and protects the embryo."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「羊膜：包绕并保护胚胎的充液膜。」
explanation_en: amnion — The fluid-filled membrane that surrounds and protects the embryo.
explanation_zh: amnion——羊膜：包绕并保护胚胎的充液膜。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The outer membrane that helps form the placenta."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「绒毛膜：协助形成胎盘的外膜。」
explanation_en: chorion — The outer membrane that helps form the placenta.
explanation_zh: chorion——绒毛膜：协助形成胎盘的外膜。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An early membrane that provides nourishment to the embryo."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「卵黄囊：为胚胎提供营养的早期膜结构。」
explanation_en: yolk sac — An early membrane that provides nourishment to the embryo.
explanation_zh: yolk sac——卵黄囊：为胚胎提供营养的早期膜结构。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The outer cell layer of the blastocyst that forms the placenta."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「滋养层：囊胚的外层细胞，形成胎盘。」
explanation_en: trophoblast — The outer cell layer of the blastocyst that forms the placenta.
explanation_zh: trophoblast——滋养层：囊胚的外层细胞，形成胎盘。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "One of the cells produced by cleavage of the zygote."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「卵裂球：受精卵卵裂产生的细胞之一。」
explanation_en: blastomere — One of the cells produced by cleavage of the zygote.
explanation_zh: blastomere——卵裂球：受精卵卵裂产生的细胞之一。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The formation and development of an embryo."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「胚胎发生：胚胎的形成与发育。」
explanation_en: embryogenesis — The formation and development of an embryo.
explanation_zh: embryogenesis——胚胎发生：胚胎的形成与发育。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "An agent that causes malformations in a developing embryo."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「致畸物：导致发育中胚胎畸形的因素。」
explanation_en: teratogen — An agent that causes malformations in a developing embryo.
explanation_zh: teratogen——致畸物：导致发育中胚胎畸形的因素。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "The period of development from conception to birth."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「妊娠期：从受孕到出生的发育时期。」
explanation_en: gestation — The period of development from conception to birth.
explanation_zh: gestation——妊娠期：从受孕到出生的发育时期。

question_en: Which term matches this definition: "Present from birth, often describing a condition or defect."
question_zh: 下列哪个术语符合该释义：「先天的：出生时即存在，常用于描述某种状况或缺陷。」
explanation_en: congenital — Present from birth, often describing a condition or defect.
explanation_zh: congenital——先天的：出生时即存在，常用于描述某种状况或缺陷。

question_zh: 词根「cyto-/-cyte」的含义是？
explanation_en: cyto-/-cyte means "cell".
explanation_zh: cyto-/-cyte 意为「细胞」。

question_zh: 词根「karyo-/nucleo-」的含义是？

question_zh: 词根「phago-/-phage」的含义是？

question_zh: 前缀「ecto-」的含义是？

question_zh: 前缀「meso-」的含义是？

question_en: What does the root "-derm/dermo-" mean?
question_zh: 词根「-derm/dermo-」的含义是？

question_zh: 词根「blasto-/-blast」的含义是？

question_zh: 词根「gameto-」的含义是？

explanation_zh: gameto- 意为「生殖细胞、配子」。

question_zh: 词根「zygo-」的含义是？

question_zh: 词根「morpho-」的含义是？
explanation_en: morpho- means "form, shape".

question_en: What does the root "histo-" mean?
question_zh: 词根「histo-」的含义是？
explanation_en: histo- means "tissue".
explanation_zh: histo- 意为「组织」。

question_en: What does the root "geno-/gen-" mean?
question_zh: 词根「geno-/gen-」的含义是？
explanation_en: geno-/gen- means "gene, origin".
explanation_zh: geno-/gen- 意为「基因、起源」。

question_en: What does the suffix "-genesis" mean?
question_zh: 后缀「-genesis」的含义是？
explanation_en: -genesis means "origin, formation".
explanation_zh: -genesis 意为「发生、形成」。

question_en: What does the prefix "micro-" mean?
question_zh: 前缀「micro-」的含义是？
explanation_en: micro- means "small".
explanation_zh: micro- 意为「微、小」。

question_en: What does the prefix "macro-" mean?
question_zh: 前缀「macro-」的含义是？
explanation_en: macro- means "large".
explanation_zh: macro- 意为「大、巨」。

question_en: What does the prefix "iso-" mean?
question_zh: 前缀「iso-」的含义是？
explanation_en: iso- means "equal".

question_zh: 词根「telo-」的含义是？
explanation_en: telo- means "end".

question_en: What does the root "-mere/mero-" mean?
question_zh: 词根「-mere/mero-」的含义是？
explanation_en: -mere/mero- means "part".
explanation_zh: -mere/mero- 意为「部分、节段」。

question_en: What does the prefix "pro-" mean?
question_zh: 前缀「pro-」的含义是？
